summary: Catering website project (Version 20) with chicken taco images, salsa chips, quesadilla, and catering section. User wants to remove 'Built by Caffeine AI' footer text.

existing_features.title: Remove the 'Built by Caffeine AI' attribution text and any associated link or UTM tracking from the Footer component. All other footer content (brand logo, quick navigation links, contact details, copyright notice) must remain unchanged.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove 'Built by Caffeine AI' text from the bottom/footer of the website
